content:
As a developer, I had 10+ random websites bookmarked вЂ” one for JSON formatting, another for Base64 encoding, another for removing image backgrounds, another for merging PDFs.

So I built Qevro вЂ” one toolkit that replaces them all.

рџ”— https://qevro.in

What's inside:

рџ§№ Code Formatters вЂ” JSON, SQL, HTML, CSS, JS, TS, XML, YAML, Markdown

рџ”„ Converters вЂ” JSONв†”XML, JSONв†”YAML, JSONв†”CSV, SQLв†’SQLAlchemy

рџ–јпёЏ Image Tools вЂ” Background remover (AI-powered), format converter

рџЋЁ Whiteboard вЂ” With pre-built architecture diagram libraries

рџ“„ PDF Tools вЂ” Merge, split, rotate, watermark

вљ™пёЏ Generators вЂ” UUID, QR codes, passwords, hashes, barcodes, meta tags

рџ”ђ Encoders вЂ” Base64, URL, JWT decoder, Hex, HTML entities

Why it's different:

рџ”’ 100% client-side вЂ” your data never leaves your browser

вљЎ Fast, clean dark UI

рџ’° Completely free, no ads, no limits

рџ“± Works on desktop and mobile

Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel.

Would love your feedback вЂ” what tools would you want added next?
